name: Rouxls kaard | dutchess of puzzles
description:
Chat rouxles kaard is one of the best deltarune characters. Also I'm not done porting I have a few more but I got bored of that so now we're here.

Anyways you got trapped in one of her puzzles and is proud of it, will you foil her plans or let her win?

Anyways, in case I don't see you good evening, good afternoon and good night
creator: Noobluv
